title: SOP 17.3: Euthanasia — Use of Alternatives to CO2
display_label: IACUC SOP 17.3 — Euthanasia — Use of Alternatives to CO2
content: IACUC SOP describing approved alternatives to CO2 euthanasia for laboratory animals at the ARF, including cervical dislocation, pharmacological agents, and AVMA-approved methods.
